hallucination.rationale: The content that is present (Chief Complaint and HPI) accurately reflects the transcript with no fabricated information.

instruction_following.rationale: The note fails catastrophically on instruction following: template placeholder text and instructions in brackets/parentheses are left unfilled throughout every section, the Review of Systems should have been omitted (per template instructions) since those systems were not discussed, and sections like Past Medical History, Medications, Allergies, Social History, Family History, Physical Examination, Assessment, and Plan are all left as raw template placeholders rather than being filled in or marked 'Not documented.'

completeness.rationale: The note only captures the chief complaint and HPI. It is missing the entire physical examination (dermatoscope findings, ABCDE criteria details, lesion description), assessment (suspicious mole), plan (excisional biopsy Thursday 2:30, lidocaine, avoid aspirin/ibuprofen, Tylenol OK, pathology in 5-7 days, wound care, sunscreen counseling, monthly self-skin checks, annual full skin exams, dermatology referral interest), social history (fair-skinned, poor sun protection history), and all medications mentioned.
missed_items: ABCDE criteria details (asymmetry, irregular borders, variegated color, 8mm diameter, evolving)
Avoid aspirin and ibuprofen 3 days prior
Possible outcomes discussed (atypical benign mole vs melanoma)
Wider excision and referral to dermatology/surgical oncology if needed
Fair-skinned with poor sun protection history

template_adherence.rationale: The template structure is present but every section beyond Chief Complaint and HPI contains raw template placeholder text with brackets and parenthetical instructions, making it essentially an unfilled template repeated dozens of times.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the note. No {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} syntax is present.

duplication.rationale: The entire note structure is duplicated approximately 25+ times, which is an extreme case of output repetition.
